Naming Convention Standards

The Naming standard is enforced using the Azure policy at Tenant level . Please refer the policy details below. You can find additional information on naming abbreviations here.

Legend

All names are lower case.

Purpose

The Standards

These items need to be unique within the specified scope. Items with Global scope need to be unique across all azure tenants (not just NGrid tenants). The bolded text represents the fixed text that is used to identify the resource type. The source for these choices is this best practices document .
